name: latticework seed, first-principles-aligned probe → swap
description: Same seed as scenario 01, but the probe now paraphrases first-principles-thinking's curator AC. Cosine prefers the top-2 (first-principles) edge over the top-1 (systems-thinking) edge, and the score is well above the noise floor, so the gate fires AND swaps the order.
notes: Same-session authorship; needs second-reader review. This is the directional-swap case — confirms the gate doesn't just fire but fires in the direction the curator ACs imply.
